'''Rob Williams''' is a [[Wikipedia:Welsh people|Welsh]] author who wrote numerous [[Star Wars comic books|''Star Wars'' comics]] for [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] in the 2000s. After penning several stories in ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' from [[2003]] to [[2005]], he went on to write twelve of the sixteen total issues of [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Rebellion'']] from [[2006]] to [[2008]].

Outside of ''[[Star Wars]]'', Williams has written ''[[Wikipedia:Judge Dredd|Judge Dredd]]'' for the British anthology comics ''[[Wikipedia:2000 AD (comics)|2000 AD]]'', as well as major [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC]] and [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] series like ''[[Wikipedia:Suicide Squad|Suicide Squad]]'' and ''[[Wikipedia:The Amazing Spider-Man|The Amazing Spider-Man]]''.<ref name="About">{{WebCite|url=https://www.robwilliamscomics.co.uk/about|text=About|work=Robwilliams.co.uk|archivedate=20231223075251}}</ref>
